themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 13 verses. Commentary leans on "Ahab died circa 853 BCE after ruling Israel for 22 years (1 Kings 16:29). His death came thro...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

1: After Ahab’s death, Moab rebelled against Israel

themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And the angel of the LORD said unto Elijah, Go down with him: be not afraid of him. And he ar...". Word-study detail reinforces "תִּירָ֖א: with him be not afraid - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".
